Inyuguti n'Inyajwi.title: 🔤 Inyuguti n'Inyajwi: A, E, I, O, U
Inyuguti n'Inyajwi.description: Uyu murongo utegura kumenya no gusoma no kwandika inyuguti z'inyajwi za Kinyarwanda. Uzamenya ijwi rya buri nyuguti no kuzisobanura.

activities.instruction: 📝 Andika neza ijwi ridasanzwe. Reka kureba neza nyuguti uzakandika. Koresha imbaraga zo kwandika.
activities.hint: 💡 Reka kureba neza nyuguti zizewe. Koresha imbaraga zo kwandika. Wibaza niba ufite ibyo wumenya.
activities.feedback: 👍 Wakore neza! Komeza uko ureba. Uragihe kuba wize!

activities.question: Ni irihe jambo rishingiye kuri E?
activities.instruction: 📖 Soma neza ibyo usabwa kandi hitamo igisanzwe.
activities.explanation: 📚 Igisanzwe ni "Enye". Reka kureba neza niba ufite ibyo wumenya. Komeza uko ureba!
activities.hint: 💡 Reka kureba neza amahitamo yose. Wibaza niba igisanzwe. Koresha ibyo wamenya.

Inyuguti n'Inyajwi.subtitle: Menya inyuguti z'inyajwi mu Kinyarwanda

Imibare.description: Uyu murongo utegura kumenya gukongeranya imibare kuva kuri 1 kugeza 5. Uzajya uzi gukora no gusubiza ibibazo bya kongeranya.

activities.instruction: 🧮 Bara neza niba ukeneye ifatabuguzi. Hitamo igisanzwe kandi wibaze niba ibisubizo byibuze.
activities.explanation: 📚 Igisanzwe ni "4". Reka kureba neza niba ufite ibyo wumenya. Komeza uko ureba!
activities.hint: 💡 Reka kureba neza amahitamo yose. Wibaza niba igisanzwe. Koresha ibyo wamenya.

activities.hint: 💡 Reka kureba neza nyuguti zizewe. Koresha imbaraga zo kwandika. Wibaza niba ufite ibyo wumenya.
activities.feedback: 👍 Wakore neza! Komeza uko ureba. Uragihe kuba wize!

activities.instruction: 📝 Kora iyi nkuru neza. Reka kureba neza ibyo usabwa kandi ukore neza.
activities.hint: 💡 Reka kureba neza nyuguti zizewe. Koresha imbaraga zo kwandika. Wibaza niba ufite ibyo wumenya.

activities.feedback: 👍 Wakore neza! Komeza uko ureba. Uragihe kuba wize!

activities.question: Umugozi w'ibarwa ni irihe bara?
activities.instruction: 📖 Soma neza ibyo usabwa kandi hitamo igisanzwe.
activities.explanation: 📚 Igisanzwe ni "Umuhondo". Reka kureba neza niba ufite ibyo wumenya. Komeza uko ureba!
activities.hint: 💡 Reka kureba neza amahitamo yose. Wibaza niba igisanzwe. Koresha ibyo wamenya.

activities.instruction: 📝 Andika neza ijwi ridasanzwe. Reka kureba neza nyuguti uzakandika. Koresha imbaraga zo kwandika.
activities.hint: 💡 Reka kureba neza nyuguti zizewe. Koresha imbaraga zo kwandika. Wibaza niba ufite ibyo wumenya.
activities.feedback: 👍 Wakore neza! Komeza uko ureba. Uragihe kuba wize!

objectives: Kwamenya amabara y'ibanze: umutuku, ubururu, utsutsa
Gusesengura amabara mu bintu bya hafi

recommendedPath.title: 🔤 Inyuguti n'Inyajwi: A, E, I, O, U
🔤 Inyajwi za Kinyarwanda: A, E, I, O, U
📝 Ibyondo: Ma, Me, Mi, Mo, Mu
